title: LUCKY HOLIDAYS Tours & Travels Website

requirements.text: Create a multi-page tours and travels website for LUCKY HOLIDAYS with a consistent header containing a clickable travel logo and company name 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS'. Clicking the logo navigates to the Home page. Include a navigation bar with links to: Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, and Ratings.

quotes: company name is LUCKY HOLIDAYS WITH TRAVEL LOGO if press the logo its need to open

acceptanceCriteria: Header displays the LUCKY HOLIDAYS travel logo alongside the company name on all pages
Clicking the logo navigates the user to the Home page
Navigation bar includes links: Home, About, Vehicles, Contact Us, Ratings
Active navigation link is visually highlighted
Header and navigation are consistent across all pages

requirements.text: Create a Home page with a hero section showcasing travel destinations, a brief introduction to LUCKY HOLIDAYS, highlights of key services (tour packages, vehicle rentals, guided trips), and a call-to-action button directing users to the Contact page.
acceptanceCriteria: Home page renders with a visually compelling hero/banner section
Brief company introduction text is displayed
Key services or features are highlighted with icons or cards
A call-to-action button is present and navigates to the Contact Us page

requirements.text: Create an About page describing the LUCKY HOLIDAYS company, its mission, values, and story in the tours and travels industry.
acceptanceCriteria: About page renders with company history/story section
Mission and values are presented clearly
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

requirements.text: Create a Vehicles page that displays available vehicles for travel packages in a card-based grid layout, each card showing a vehicle image placeholder, vehicle name, type, capacity, and a brief description.
acceptanceCriteria: Vehicles page renders with a grid of vehicle cards
Each card displays a vehicle image, name, type, capacity, and description
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

requirements.text: Create a Contact Us page that prominently displays the company phone number 9663202989 and email address lakkiholidays@gmail.com, along with a contact form (name, email, message fields) for inquiry submissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact page displays phone number 9663202989 prominently
Contact page displays email lakkiholidays@gmail.com prominently
Email address is a clickable mailto link
Phone number is a clickable tel link
A contact form with name, email, and message fields is present
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

requirements.text: Create a Ratings page (or section) where customer reviews and star ratings for LUCKY HOLIDAYS are displayed. Store ratings and reviews in the backend and allow users to submit a rating (1–5 stars) and a short review text.
acceptanceCriteria: Ratings page displays existing customer reviews with star ratings and review text
Users can submit a new rating (1–5 stars) and review comment
Submitted ratings are persisted in the backend
Average overall rating is displayed
Page is accessible from the navigation bar

requirements.text: Apply a warm, adventurous travel-themed visual design across the entire website: use earthy tones (amber, warm orange, deep green) with clean white backgrounds, bold serif-style headings, and card-based layouts. Ensure the design is fully responsive for mobile and desktop viewports.
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm earthy tones (amber, orange, deep green) consistently
Typography uses bold, readable headings and clean body text
Layout is responsive and renders well on both mobile and desktop
Visual theme is consistent across all pages

constraints: Contact page must display phone number 9663202989 and email lakkiholidays@gmail.com exactly as provided
Company name must appear as 'LUCKY HOLIDAYS' throughout the site
Clicking the logo must navigate to the Home page

required: Travel-themed logo mark illustration with a road, mountain, and sun motif in warm amber and deep green tones, suitable for a tours company (lucky-holidays-logo.dim_200x200.png)
Wide scenic travel hero banner with a winding mountain road and lush landscape in warm golden-hour lighting (hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png)
Illustrated vehicle card placeholder showing a comfortable travel van/minibus in warm tones (vehicle-placeholder.dim_400x280.png)
